note: Generated-only Bressloff figure stills and derived metrics for public-safe geometry calibration. This report does not include original paper scans or crops.

preset.label: Fig 29 square non-contoured planform
preset.visual_target: single inverse retinocortical map of a non-contoured square activity planform
preset.source_note: Activity-threshold planform; no local orientation contours are sampled.

preset.label: Fig 29 roll non-contoured planform
preset.visual_target: single inverse retinocortical map of a non-contoured roll activity planform
preset.source_note: Rendered with the rings/tunnel roll orientation; rotate manually for ray or spiral variants.

preset.label: Fig 30 rhombic non-contoured planform
preset.visual_target: single inverse retinocortical map of a non-contoured rhombic activity planform
preset.source_note: Activity-threshold companion to the contoured rhombic Figure 33/34 family.

preset.label: Fig 30 hexagonal non-contoured planform
preset.visual_target: single inverse retinocortical map of a non-contoured hexagonal activity planform
preset.source_note: Uses the neutral three-wave hexagonal basis without interpreting local contour orientation.

preset.label: Fig 31 square/cobweb even planform
preset.visual_target: square lattice in cortex mapped to cobweb-like visual-field structure
preset.source_note: Analytic planform preset for checking the double-map geometry.

preset.label: Fig 31 even roll subpanel
preset.visual_target: even roll branch mapped through the double retinocortical map
preset.source_note: Roll companion subpanel for the even square/cobweb figure.

preset.label: Fig 32 square/cobweb odd planform
preset.visual_target: odd square lattice variant mapped through the retino-cortical double map
preset.source_note: Analytic planform preset for checking parity-dependent contour structure.

preset.label: Fig 32 odd roll subpanel
preset.visual_target: odd roll branch mapped through the double retinocortical map
preset.source_note: Roll companion subpanel for the odd square/cobweb figure.

preset.label: Fig 33 rhombic even planform
preset.visual_target: rhombic cortical lattice mapped into warped visual-field contours
preset.source_note: Analytic planform preset for the oblique-lattice family.

preset.label: Fig 33 even rhombic-roll subpanel
preset.visual_target: even roll branch in the rhombic family mapped through the double map
preset.source_note: Roll companion subpanel for the even rhombic figure.

preset.label: Fig 34 rhombic odd planform
preset.visual_target: odd rhombic cortical lattice mapped through the retino-cortical double map
preset.source_note: Analytic companion to the even rhombic Fig 33 preset; calibration still depends on the paper rhombic angle.

preset.label: Fig 34 odd rhombic-roll subpanel
preset.visual_target: odd roll branch in the rhombic family mapped through the double map
preset.source_note: Roll companion subpanel for the odd rhombic figure.

preset.label: Fig 35 hexagonal even planform
preset.visual_target: hexagonal branch with pi-phase sign structure
preset.source_note: Analytic planform preset for the three-wave hexagonal family.

preset.label: Fig 35 zero-hexagonal even planform
preset.visual_target: 0-hexagonal even phase partner of the Fig 35 hexagonal planform
preset.source_note: Analytic phase companion to the pi-hexagonal Fig 35 preset.

preset.label: Fig 36 triangular odd planform
preset.visual_target: odd triangular branch on a hexagonal lattice mapped through the double map
preset.source_note: Uses the odd hexagonal sine-combination branch; higher-order terms determine stability in the source discussion.

preset.label: Fig 36 zero-hexagonal odd planform
preset.visual_target: odd 0-hexagonal branch on a hexagonal lattice mapped through the double map
preset.source_note: Odd-parity companion to the even 0-hexagonal phase target.
